title: campylospermum squamosum
intro: Campylospermum squamosum, a species of flowering plant in the family Ochnaceae, is a type of evergreen tree native to tropical Africa. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Campylospermum squamosum include reducing fever, relieving headaches, and treating skin infections, among others. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by boiling the leaves or bark in water, with the resulting tea being consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
